title: adult swim
wikitext:
[]: adult swim             Quote Post by Hand of God » Tue Jul 12, 2005 6:23 pm when r they going to show eva in adult swim?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Jul 12, 2005 6:59 pm "In the near future."

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Jul 12, 2005 7:04 pm No one knows yet, we have no datails about when or how eva will be aired.

[]:             Quote Post by ShetenshiSenshi » Fri Jul 15, 2005 7:08 pm I'm still hoping never. Still clinging to a false hope.

[]:             Quote Post by NERV » Fri Jul 15, 2005 10:35 pm I watch adult swim for the comedy (family guy, futurama) and some of the new anime on the program (samurai champloo)...but NEVER in a million years do i wish for the greatness that is evangelion to be aired on this network (adult swim). It would get too cut and put far off from the real story and reality. The kids at my school who watch inuyasha (which personally i hate) think they know everything about the shows on adult swim which makes me want to hurt them because they annoy me, will watch evangelion and think the evas are robots and be like "Hey thats pretty cool i want this to be my new favorite show". and ruin my life. Or then again maybe those retards will dislike evangelion and the show will get canceled. because i know im not watching the tv version. :twisted: :evil:

[]: Re: adult swim             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Sat Jul 16, 2005 12:38 am Hand of God wrote: when r they going to show eva in adult swim?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Jul 16, 2005 12:41 am but NEVER in a million years do i wish for the greatness that is evangelion to be aired on this network

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Jul 16, 2005 8:03 am or so we hope... most likely any nudity will be removed, and perhaps some of the violent scenes

[]:             Quote Post by RuaDragon » Sat Jul 16, 2005 9:24 am Is anyone here actually going to watch it?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Sat Jul 16, 2005 10:08 am NERV wrote: ...but NEVER in a million years do i wish for the greatness that is evangelion to be aired on this network (adult swim). It would get too cut and put far off from the real story and reality. The kids at my school who watch inuyasha (which personally i hate) think they know everything about the shows on adult swim which makes me want to hurt them because they annoy me, will watch evangelion and think the evas are robots and be like "Hey thats pretty cool i want this to be my new favorite show". and ruin my life.

[]:             Quote Post by Machinehead » Sat Jul 16, 2005 1:39 pm Mr. Bud wrote: NERV wrote: ...but NEVER in a million years do i wish for the greatness that is evangelion to be aired on this network (adult swim). It would get too cut and put far off from the real story and reality. The kids at my school who watch inuyasha (which personally i hate) think they know everything about the shows on adult swim which makes me want to hurt them because they annoy me, will watch evangelion and think the evas are robots and be like "Hey thats pretty cool i want this to be my new favorite show". and ruin my life.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Bud » Sat Jul 16, 2005 4:14 pm Well, I wasn't talking to you, and I just think it's downright silly to hold a TV show in such Holy Grail status.

[]:             Quote Post by RuaDragon » Sat Jul 16, 2005 11:34 pm Mr. Bud wrote: ^^And yes, I'm going to watch it. I think it will be fun to see what gets the axe.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 17, 2005 1:34 am I thought Em was already doing that on the main page www.evamonkey.com

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Jul 17, 2005 2:10 am Every instance of nudity in the television series is more-or-less forgetable (not to mention fairly rare), and ultimatey disposable. If your n00b classmates don't see Rei's buttcrack, it doesn't mean they won't understand the finer points of the series; blame some of the dub and the lack of a televised alternative to the TV ending for that. I just think it's downright silly to hold a TV show in such Holy Grail status.

[]:             Quote Post by RuaDragon » Sun Jul 17, 2005 2:48 am Timesplitter 01 wrote: I thought Em was already doing that on the main page www.evamonkey.com

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Jul 17, 2005 4:02 am Timesplitter 01 wrote: I thought Em was already doing that on the main page www.evamonkey.com

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 17, 2005 5:15 am He is giving links to animenetworks obsevations to what has been cut and changed

[]:             Quote Post by RuaDragon » Sun Jul 17, 2005 5:52 am Yes, yes, but I meant a list of what is censored in the 'adult swim' airings.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 17, 2005 5:54 am RuaDragon wrote: Yes, yes, but I meant a list of what is censored in the 'adult swim' airings.
